title: Agentic Coding in Xcode: A First Step in Implementation (Part 1): From Concept to Runnable Environment
description: A hands-on roadmap based on Xcode 26.3 and Gemini CLI: You will go from environment setup, MCP connection and your first executable session from 0 to 1.
content:
> **TL;DR**: Apple 正在将 [AI 辅助研发](/posts/ai-coding-evolution-copilot-vs-antigravity/) 推向 Agentic Coding 的新高度。本文是《Agentic Coding 在 Xcode 落地指南》三部曲的上篇，主打极速落地。手把手教你在本机跑通 Xcode 26.3 与 Gemini CLI (>0.27.3) 的底层 MCP (Model Context Protocol) 链路，建立起从“聊天AI”走向“可执行智能体”的第一步。 ## 写在前面 This is the first in a three-part series, inspired by an article by Peter Friese (link at the end), but the content will be rewritten in a more localized Chinese version incorporating my own practical experience. The key points are:**You can get it running on your machine today.**Series Navigation: - 第 1 篇（本文）：从概念到环境准备 - [第 2 篇：从提示词到可运行 Demo（Newton’s Apple）](/posts/agentic-coding-xcode-gemini-02-hands-on/) - [第 3 篇：常见坑、兼容性与团队落地清单](/posts/agentic-coding-xcode-gemini-03-troubleshooting/) ## 为什么现在要关注 Agentic Coding？ Xcode 26.3 upgrades "AI-assisted coding" from chat to "Agent collaboration": - 不只是给建议，还能配合工程上下文做修改 - 能触发构建、根据错误继续迭代修复 - 通过 MCP（Model Context Protocol）打通外部 Agent 与 Xcode 能力 Simply put, it used to be "you write, AI reads," now it's more like "you set the goals, the agent runs the process." ## 先决条件（别跳过） To reproduce this process, the following version is recommended: 1. `Xcode 26.3`2. `Gemini CLI >= 0.27.3`Why can't the Gemini version be too low? - 在 Xcode 26.3 早期桥接返回里， `structuredContent`There have been compatibility issues.- Gemini CLI 后续补丁已经处理了这类响应（修复链路见文末参考）。 Install Gemini CLI: ```bash npm install -g @google/gemini-cli gemini --version ``` ## 在 Xcode 中打开 MCP 入口 Path (macOS): 1. 打开 Xcode 2. `Xcode > Settings...`(shortcut key `⌘,`）3. 进入 `Intelligence`4. 在 `Model Context Protocol`Area Open`Xcode Tools` ![Enable Xcode Tools](https://peterfriese.dev/_astro/enable-xcode-tools.BjIu-Z5y_2LRtl.webp) _Image: Enable MCP support in Xcode Settings > Intelligence (Source: peterfriese.dev)_This step is crucial: without enabling it, even if the CLI is configured correctly, you won't see Xcode's tool capabilities. ## 把 Gemini CLI 连接到 Xcode MCP Bridge Navigate to your project root directory and execute: ```bash gemini mcp add xcode-tools xcrun mcpbridge ```This will generate (or update) configuration files within the project: - `.gemini/settings.json`It is recommended to configure "by project" rather than enabling it globally: - 只在需要 Xcode 能力的仓库里启用 - 避免每次开 CLI 都弹授权确认 - 多项目切换时更干净，权限边界更清晰 ## 启动一次最小可行会话 In this order: 1. 先打开 Xcode 工程 2. 再在项目根目录执行 `gemini`3. 接受 Xcode 的外部工具授权弹窗 ![Allow Gemini CLI access](https://peterfriese.dev/_astro/allow-gemini-cli-access.BFKbhU-T_1wjQe6.webp) _Image: Xcode will pop up a permission confirmation window upon first connection (Source: peterfriese.dev)_You can first check if MCP is functioning correctly within the CLI: ```text /mcp list /mcp desc ``` ![List available tools](https://peterfriese.dev/_astro/list-available-tools.B9ukbUdM_Z1OL9y8.webp) _Image: After a successful connection, the CLI should be able to list xcode-tools (Source: peterfriese.dev)_ If you can see`xcode-tools`The tool description and its associated tools indicate that the connection has been established. ## 你应该形成的心智模型 The essence of this link is: ```mermaid graph LR A[Gemini CLI] <--"MCP Protocol
(JSON-RPC)"--> B(xcrun mcpbridge) B <--"Xcode Internal API"--> C[Xcode Tools] style A fill:#e1f5fe,stroke:#01579b,stroke-width:2px style C fill:#f3e5f5,stroke:#4a148c,stroke-width:2px style B fill:#fff,stroke:#666,stroke-dasharray: 5 5 ``` in: - Gemini 负责理解目标、规划步骤 - Xcode 提供工程级动作能力（构建、上下文、诊断） - 你负责最终判断与验收（Human in the loop） ## 本篇小结 You have now accomplished three of the most important things: - 确认了版本前置条件 - 在 Xcode 中启用了 MCP 能力 - 用 Gemini CLI 成功连通并验证工具可见 In the next article, we'll jump straight into practical application: using a high-quality target hint word, we'll have the Agent collaboratively generate a "playable" SwiftUI + SpriteKit mini-project, and explain how to let it fix compilation errors on its own. ## 参考资料 - Peter Friese: Agentic Coding in Xcode with Gemini CLI https://peterfriese.dev/blog/2026/agentic-coding-xcode-geminicli/- Apple: Xcode 26.3 unlocks the power of agentic coding https://www.apple.com/newsroom/2026/02/xcode-26-point-3-unlocks-the-power-of-agentic-coding/- Apple Docs: Setting up coding intelligence https://developer.apple.com/documentation/Xcode/setting-up-coding-intelligence- Apple Docs: Giving external agentic coding tools access to Xcode https://developer.apple.com/documentation/xcode/giving-agentic-coding-tools-access-to-xcode- Gemini CLI release `v0.27.3` https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli/releases/tag/v0.27.3
